ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, creases will not override what content you have folded in your file. You can change this so that creases always start folded.
ast.target: 默认情况下，折叠标记不会覆盖您在文件中已折叠的内容。您可以更改此设置，使折叠标记始终以折叠状态开始。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When creating a new file with creases in the template, do you want the creases to start folded or unfolded? Choose 'fold and clear' to have the creases folded and removed from the newly created note.
ast.target: 当使用模板创建包含折叠标记的新文件时，您希望折叠标记以折叠还是展开状态开始？选择“折叠并清除”将使折叠标记折叠并从新创建的笔记中移除。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How should creases behave when opening a new file?
ast.target: 打开新文件时，折叠标记应如何表现？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How should creases in templates behave?
ast.target: 模板中的折叠标记应如何表现？

ast.name: desc
ast.source: By default, creases will not override what content you have folded in your file. You can change this so that creases always start folded.
ast.target: 默认情况下，折叠标记不会覆盖您在文件中已折叠的内容。您可以更改此设置，使折叠标记始终以折叠状态开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When creating a new file with creases in the template, do you want the creases to start folded or unfolded? Choose 'fold and clear' to have the creases folded and removed from the newly created note.
ast.target: 当使用模板创建包含折叠标记的新文件时，您希望折叠标记以折叠还是展开状态开始？选择“折叠并清除”将使折叠标记折叠并从新创建的笔记中移除。

ast.name: fold-and-clear
ast.source: Fold them and clear the creases
ast.target: 折叠它们并清除折叠标记

ast.name: name
ast.source: How should creases behave when opening a new file?
ast.target: 打开新文件时，折叠标记应如何表现？
